Additional VLCCs signaling for Basrah, Iraq: Peru Prosperity IMO 9418066, Suriname Prosperity IMO 9376749, and Dominica Prosperity IMO 9395496. So at least 7 VLCCs linked to Sinokor so far are expected to load in Basrah, based on AIS data. 
#Shipping #OOTT #Iraq https://t.co/ONYwvtB4gn
quoted_text:
1/2 Four VLCCs to load at Basrah, Iraq, based on AIS data. South Africa Prosperity (IMO 9526461) is already there at anchor. The others are Congo Prosperity ( IMO 9792266) Costa Rica Prosperity (IMO 9534858), Ecuador Prosperity ( IMO 9315147 ). Equasis data shows that the three are linked to Sinokor Maritime Co Ltd/ ship manager/commercial manager (South Korea-based). 

In addition to these, there's VLCC Singapore Loyalty (IMO 9322293) that is in Basrah as of today.

More broadly, the narrative that the market is already awash with crude looks increasingly difficult to reconcile with relatively tight commercial inventories and continued draws from storage. Supply is recovering, but “oversupplied” still looks like a stretch. #oott
quoted_text: NEW🇸🇦: Sources with knowledge of the matter told @ArgusMedia #Saudi crude exports have averaged around 5.8mn b/d in recent days, rather than the ~6.3mn b/d reported by some. The higher figure, in fact, includes stranded cargoes in the Gulf rather than solely fresh export loadings, the sources said. #oott

If #Oil traders sold August #CS contracts in April, they would've pocketed nearly $10K/contract, since the contract is now only worth about $20.
quoted_text:
#OOTT #WTI 
For this reason, #Oil's #CS trades are highly lucrative yet extremely risky, since each tick is worth $1. When CS exceeded 1,000 points in March and April, every contract was $10K or more.
